channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Supreme Court expands presidential firing authority while imposing some restrictions
item.description: The Supreme Court ruled Monday that presidents have broad power to dismiss senior officials over policy disagreements, though certain limits remain.

item.title: California moves to weaken an office that could be won by a conservative
item.description: Under a deal between Governor Newsom and the Legislature, the state superintendent will no longer oversee California schools.

item.title: Supreme Court to review Arizona's voter citizenship proof requirement
item.description: The Supreme Court agreed Monday to hear a major election case next term on whether Arizona can demand proof of citizenship for voter registration.

item.title: International judges cannot claim rights they do not possess
item.description: The law is clear: constitutional rights do not apply to foreign nationals outside the country.
